"/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13" cr libblake3.a CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_dispatch.c.o CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_portable.c.o "CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_avx2_x86-64_unix.S.o" "CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_avx512_x86-64_unix.S.o" "CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_sse2_x86-64_unix.S.o" "CMakeFiles/blake3.dir/blake3_sse41_x86-64_unix.S.o"
"/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13" libblake3.a
